allow: Bash(python -c "from app.services.upsert_engine import UpsertEngine; print\('upsert_engine: OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from app.services.upload_job_service import get_job_status; print\('upload_job_service: OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from app.services.tempdb_cleanup_service import tempdb_cleaner; print\('tempdb_cleanup: OK'\)")

PowerShell($set = [bool]$env:AZURE_SECRET -or [bool]$env:AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET; "AZURE_SECRET set: $set"; if \($env:AZURE_SECRET\) { "len=$\($env:AZURE_SECRET.Length\)" }; if \($env:AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET\) { "alt name set, len=$\($env:AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET.Length\)" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,State,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($p = Get-Process -Id 24548 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "STILL RUNNING: $\($p.ProcessName\) PID=$\($p.Id\)" } else { "Process 24548 is GONE" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $listen = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($listen\) { "Port 8080 still in LISTEN state by PID $\($listen.OwningProcess\)" } else { "Port 8080 is FREE \(no LISTEN socket\)" })

PowerShell(try { $l = [System.Net.Sockets.TcpListener]::new\([System.Net.IPAddress]::Loopback, 8080\); $l.Start\(\); "BIND OK — port 8080 is bindable"; $l.Stop\(\) } catch { "BIND FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try { Remove-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $_.LocalPort -RemotePort $_.RemotePort -LocalAddress $_.LocalAddress -RemoteAddress $_.RemoteAddress -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction Stop; "closed $\($_.LocalAddress\):$\($_.LocalPort\) <-> $\($_.RemoteAddress\):$\($_.RemotePort\) [$\($_.State\)]" } catch { "skip \($\($_.State\)\): $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Group-Object -Property RemoteAddress,RemotePort,State | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ Count=$_.Count; Remote=$_.Name } } | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($ports = 54175,54159,54300,54375,54283,54201,54351,54315,54223,54363,54235,54255,54227; foreach \($p in $ports\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.RemotePort -eq 8080 } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($c\) { $proc = Get-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "$p -> PID $\($c.OwningProcess\) [$\(if\($proc\){$proc.ProcessName}else{'<dead>'}\)] state=$\($c.State\)" } else { "$p -> no matching outbound entry" } })
